---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Perron-NS
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: ""
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation. E.g. "When planning a
journey I can't ..."

## Describe the solution you'd like

What you'd like to happen. If it affects a specific surface, note which:

- [ ] Glasses lens
- [ ] Phone companion app
- [ ] Backend proxy / data
- [ ] Other

## Describe alternatives you've considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've thought about.

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
